description: Style NoteClassic men's four-hole lace-up shoe with detailed brogueing and a refined stacked flat heel, for the flamboyant cosmopolitan, from arrow. Build your shoe closet around these classic wingtip brogues. The pair references British heritage style with its two tone upper. These shoes look best worn with a trench coat, classic denims and an understated belt.Product DetailsBrown shoe with leather upper, detailed brogueing (perforations), overlays and reinforced overlay on the low-cut heel for support to the ankleFour hole lace-up shoePadded tongue and innerOutsole adhered to the upperTPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a stacked heelMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
